MARETO HQ  —  FORM BUILDER USER GUIDE
How to Add a Section Header to Your Form
Form Builder — User Guide

What is a Section Header?

A Section Header is a formatted text element that appears before a group of questions. It helps organize your form into clear sections for respondents.

Organizes Content

Groups related questions together into clear, logical sections.

Improves Readability

Makes your form easier to navigate and understand for respondents.

Formatted Text

Appears as a styled heading before a group of questions in your form.

Step 1: Open Your Form

Navigate to your form

Either create a new form or open an existing form you would like to edit.

Form Creator — Navigate to the Form Builder module and open or create a form

Step 2: Click Into a Field (View Mode)

  • In View Mode, click into any field where you would like the section header to appear before the questions.

Step 3: Click “Edit”

  • After clicking into the field, select Edit.
Note

This will open the editing panel for that field.

Click Edit to open the editing panel for the selected field

Step 4: Add a Section Header

  • In the Section Header field, type the name of your section (e.g., “Client Information” or “Program Details”).

Type the name of your section in the Section Header field

Step 5: Adjust Formatting (Optional)

You can customize the section header using the toolbar above the text editor:

Formatting toolbar showing header size, text styling, alignment, and color options

Changing the header size

Choose between H1, H2, or H3 to set the appropriate visual hierarchy.

Adjusting text formatting

Apply bold, italics, or underline to emphasize your section header.

Modifying alignment

Align your header text to the left, center, or right as needed.

Changing text color

Change the text color if applicable to match your form’s design.

Make your selection using the toolbar above the text editor.

Step 6: Click Save

  • Once your header is formatted as desired, click Save.
Result

The section header will now appear above your selected group of questions.

Format Header

Apply your desired header size, text formatting, and alignment.

Review

Confirm the section header looks correct in the editor.

Click Save

Save your changes to publish the section header on your form.

Result

You now have a clearly defined section header that appears before your questions, improving organization and readability for form respondents.

Organized

Questions are grouped into clear, logical sections.

Readable

Respondents can easily navigate and understand your form.

Professional

Your form looks polished and well-structured.
